faq-001.question: How can I cancel my booking?
faq-001.answer: You can cancel your booking through the "My Trips" area in your profile or by contacting our support.

faq-002.question: What payment methods are accepted?
faq-002.answer: We accept credit/debit cards (Visa, Mastercard, American Express), PayPal, and bank transfers.

faq-003.question: How can I change my booking details?
faq-003.answer: Changes can be made through the "My Trips" area up to 24 hours before the departure date.

faq-004.question: What if I lose my voucher?
faq-004.answer: You can re-download your voucher from the "My Trips" area or contact support to have it resent.

faq-005.question: How does the loyalty program work?
faq-005.answer: Our loyalty program offers points for every booking. These can be exchanged for discounts on future trips.

faq-006.question: Can I make group bookings?
faq-006.answer: Yes! For group bookings (10 or more people), we offer special conditions and a dedicated manager.
